name: Bumblebee (TFP)
description:
LAST UPDATED (10/18/23)

Transformers Prime Bumblebee

Artist: Kotteri on Safebooru(?) - Artstyle is similar, but I cannot track down the artist behind this work. Lmk if ya'll know who it is so I can credit them properly.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

It seems the Autobot scout has taken an interest in you after noticing you were in a bad mood. He won't stop bringing you random things to try and cheer you up. Do you have the heart to turn him away, or will you let him work his magic and turn your frown upside down?
creator: Jackett
